name: nexus-installer
description: NEXUS installer — native macOS app for installing NEXUS in a few clicks
author: Lucas Topinka

scripts.build: pnpm run build:renderer && pnpm run build:main
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:main && concurrently -k "pnpm run dev:renderer" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NEXUS_INSTALLER_DEV=1 electron dist/main/main.js"

extendInfo.NSContactsUsageDescription: NEXUS uses Contacts to look up people when you ask about someone by name.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: NEXUS takes screenshots when you ask it to see what's on your screen.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: NEXUS controls Finder, Contacts, and other apps via AppleScript to run tasks for you.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: NEXUS never captures camera input; this key is required only to prevent macOS from mistakenly blocking unrelated media APIs.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NEXUS never captures microphone input; this key is present only to satisfy Electron's media-API requirements.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: NEXUS can look up your schedule when you ask about your day or upcoming events.
extendInfo.NSRemindersUsageDescription: NEXUS can read and create reminders when you ask it to schedule something.
